title: PokéNet [Cobblemon]
description: PokéNet introduces a unique, Pokémon-powered storage network inspired by systems like Applied Energetics 2, Refined Storage, and Tom’s Storage.
body:
# PokéNet

**PokéNet** is a Cobblemon side-mod that introduces a unique, Pokémon-powered storage network inspired by systems like Applied Energistics 2, Refined Storage, and Tom’s Storage. Instead of relying on traditional machines or energy systems, PokéNet uses Pokémon themselves to power and expand the network.

_This mod is still WIP so things will change this is a release for getting FEEDBACK_

## Features

- Players build a modular storage system using special PokéNet blocks. Each module can house a Pokémon, which becomes visible inside the block and actively contributes to the network. Depending on the Pokémon’s species, type, stats, and other attributes, different features of the storage network become unlocked or enhanced.

- Certain Pokémon enable entirely new capabilities, such as crafting terminals, PC access, item transfer through pipes, or wireless network access. Others improve the network by increasing storage capacity, speeding up item transfer, or enhancing crafting performance. Multiple compatible Pokémon can be installed across modules, allowing their bonuses to stack and scale the network as it grows.

- PokéNet encourages players to experiment with different Pokémon combinations to build powerful and specialized storage systems. Training stronger Pokémon or choosing the right species can significantly improve network performance, turning Pokémon into the heart of a fully automated logistics system.

_Compatible with: JEI, JADE, EMI (More coming soon)_
